rationale: Re-ran the full Bead-2 Verification checklist fresh at fix commit 2b55d1a7; all steps pass and the 2-file delta introduces no regression. (V1) ImpactedDomainSeverityMatchesPlanApprove PASS-line grep exit 0; (V2) ADRTouchpointExtractionBoundary PASS-line grep exit 0, now 8 subtests all PASS including the 3 new boundary subtests; (V3) go test -count=1 ./internal/validate ok 126.6s uncached; (V4) go test -count=1 ./internal/approve ok 10.2s uncached; (V5) branch-built self-check go build ./cmd/mindspec && validate spec 110-... -> 'all checks passed' exit 0; (V6) doc-sync: the fix commit tip is code-only (spec.go + spec_test.go), but the cumulative bead range 62cd6df3^..HEAD carries .mindspec/domains/workflow/architecture.md — which is what the doc-sync gate evaluates; (V7) go build ./... exit 0. Regex fix reviewed: `\[(ADR-\d{4})([^0-9\]][^\]]*)?\]\([^)]+\)` is RE2-safe (MustCompile succeeds, no lookahead) and parity-safe — every legitimate 4-digit bare-ID and filename-form anchor still matches (group 1 unchanged), while a 5th digit can never be absorbed, so [ADR-12345] and [ADR-00311] now produce no match/no diagnostic instead of truncating to ADR-1234 or false-passing via the ADR-0031 prefix. No new error class; parity preserved. Tree clean, HEAD unchanged, /tmp binary removed.
findings: V1/V2 named-test PASS-line greps both exit 0 at 2b55d1a7.

TestValidateSpec_ADRTouchpointExtractionBoundary now runs 8 subtests, all PASS: the 5 originals plus bare-id-anchor-existing-passes, five-digit-id-produces-no-diagnostic, and five-digit-id-does-not-false-pass-via-four-digit-prefix.
V3 go test -count=1 ./internal/validate: ok 126.562s (fresh) — no regression in the existing plan-approve/impacted-domains/adr-cite tests.
V4 go test -count=1 ./internal/approve: ok 10.175s (fresh) — spec-approve inheritance still green.
V5 branch-built self-check: freshly built ./cmd/mindspec validates 110's own spec ('all checks passed', exit 0) — the widened+bounded regex still resolves 110's real anchored touchpoints.

V6 doc-sync nuance: `git show --name-only HEAD` (fix commit) is code-only by design; `git diff --name-only 62cd6df3^..HEAD` confirms the workflow architecture.md region is present in the cumulative bead diff the gate actually evaluates.

Regex boundary is correct and parity-safe: group 1 (ADR-\d{4}) and the extraction code are untouched; the optional group 2 ([^0-9\]]...) forbids a digit immediately after the 4-digit ID, so 5-digit anchors fall outside the pattern entirely (no diagnostic, no false pass, no new error class). RE2-safe — MustCompile succeeded (build + tests green).
